title: Elytra Booster Mod
description: An add-on for Immersive Aircraft adding the Elytra Booster!
body:
This mod adds an upgrade to Immersive Aircraft to try to make the airplanes viable in the end game of a Minecraft playtrough! It's also meant for servers that disable the use of the elytra but still want to use it for it's speed.

TODO (not all of these are guaranteed)
Add more MKs of the booster
Custom plane(s)
Config for disabling the elytra
Achievements
support for more language support

Big thanks to Conczin for helping me out!
